CategoryBreakdown.description: CategoryBreakdown retains the legacy wire shape for category claims.

activeCampaigns.description: Legacy live campaign count. Zero is a not-collected compatibility sentinel.

change24h.description: Legacy 24-hour change. Zero is a not-collected compatibility sentinel.

share.description:
Published share (0-1) when verified. Zero is an unavailable sentinel when
 the category evidence is unverified.

trending.description: Legacy live trending indicator. Corrected static snapshots emit false.

CryptoGivingSummary.description:
CryptoGivingSummary retains the legacy wire shape. Corrected snapshots expose
 only verified values; zero/empty fields are unavailable compatibility
 sentinels, not measured on-chain activity.

dailyInflowUsd.description: Daily USD equivalent from a verified annual claim, if available.

pctOfTotal.description: Verified on-chain share of the relevant giving denominator, if available.

items.description: Verified receiving platforms or organizations, if available.

transactions24h.description: Measured transactions in the last 24 hours, if a collector exists.

Error.description: Error is returned when a handler encounters an error. It contains a simple error message that the developer can customize.

message.description: Error message (e.g., 'user not found', 'database connection failed')

FieldViolation.description: FieldViolation describes a single validation error for a specific field.

description.description: Human-readable description of the validation violation (e.g., 'must be a valid email address', 'required field missing')

field.description: The field path that failed validation (e.g., 'user.email' for nested fields). For header validation, this will be the header name (e.g., 'X-API-Key')

ForbiddenError.description: Returned when a PRO-gated endpoint denies access because the caller has no resolved authenticated user, entitlements cannot be verified, or the caller lacks the required entitlement tier.

requiredTier.description: Minimum entitlement tier required for this endpoint.

GatewayError.description: Returned by gateway infrastructure errors before an RPC handler runs, such as origin, routing, method, authentication, or quota checks.

error.description: Gateway error reason or structured gateway failure details.

GetGivingSummaryRequest.description: GetGivingSummaryRequest specifies projections over the published-claim snapshot.

categoryLimit.description:
Number of category rows to return (0 = all). Aggregates and provenance
 continue to describe the full snapshot.

platformLimit.description:
Number of platform rows to return (0 = all). Aggregates and provenance
 continue to describe the full snapshot.

GetGivingSummaryResponse.description: GetGivingSummaryResponse contains a cacheable published-claim snapshot.

fetchedAt.description:
Cache/response materialization time as Unix epoch milliseconds. This is not
 source publication or observation time. A value of 0 means the snapshot is
 unavailable/degraded, not that giving activity is zero.. Warning: Values > 2^53 may lose precision in JavaScript

GivingProvenance.description:
GivingProvenance records one auditable published claim or one explicit
 collection/compatibility status. No field represents a source observation
 time; source reference periods and verified publication dates stay separate
 from response/cache timestamps.

accessedAt.description: Date the source was checked (YYYY-MM-DD); not a source observation time.

items.description:
Stable proto response field paths covered by this evidence record. Field
 names use the proto snake_case spelling (for example,
 "summary.estimated_daily_flow_usd").

denominator.description: Time/value denominator used by the source claim.

derivation.description: Explicit derivation applied to the claim, or why no derivation is allowed.

includedInHighlightedAggregate.description: Whether this claim contributes to the highlighted tracked-platform aggregate.

measurementBasis.description:
What the reported number measures (annual, weekly average, cumulative,
 institutional context, compatibility sentinel, or collection status).

notes.description: Exact-claim text and any limitations needed to audit the record.

referencePeriod.description: Period covered by the source claim (for example, "2024" or "25 years cumulative").

reportedUnit.description: Unit attached to reported_value without implicit currency conversion.

reportedValue.description: Numeric value exactly as reported or recorded for the compatibility status.

sourceLocator.description: Stable location within the source where the claim can be found.

sourceName.description: Publisher or authority responsible for the referenced claim.

sourcePublishedAt.description:
Verified source publication date when known. Empty means not verified; it
 must never fall back to generated_at, fetched_at, or access time.

sourceUrl.description: HTTPS URL for the source or stable audit record.

status.description:
Verification status. Allowed values: "verified", "partially_verified",
 "unverified", "not_collected", "not_applicable". Consumers must treat
 unknown future values as "unverified".

subject.description: Human-readable subject of the claim or collection-status record.

GivingSummary.description:
GivingSummary is a cacheable snapshot of published giving claims. Source
 reference periods live in provenance; generated_at is only the time this
 response snapshot was materialized.

activityIndex.description:
Legacy numeric compatibility sentinel. Corrected snapshots emit 0 and
 activity_index_available=false; this is not a measured score.

activityIndexAvailable.description:
True only when activity_index contains a measured score. Corrected
 published-claim snapshots emit false.

dataMode.description:
Evidence mode: "published_estimate" or "partial_estimate". If absent in an
 older payload, consumers must treat the payload as legacy/unknown, never as
 a published estimate by proto scalar default.

estimatedDailyFlowUsd.description:
Daily USD equivalent of only aggregate-eligible, verified annual or
 defensibly annualized tracked-platform claims. It is not a live daily
 observation or an estimate of all global giving.

generatedAt.description:
Response summary generation time (ISO 8601). This is a transport/cache
 timestamp, not a source publication or observation time.

trend.description:
Legacy string compatibility sentinel. Corrected snapshots retain "stable"
 with trend_available=false; this is not a measured directional trend.

trendAvailable.description:
True only when trend contains a measured directional trend. Corrected
 published-claim snapshots emit false.

InstitutionalGiving.description: InstitutionalGiving tracks large-scale structured philanthropy and ODA.

oecdOdaAnnualUsdBn.description: Latest OECD ODA total (annual, USD billions).

InvalidRequestBodyError.description: Returned when a JSON POST request body is empty or malformed.

JmespathProjectionError.description: Returned when a REST jmespath projection is invalid or exceeds the expression/output byte limits.

original_keys.description: Top-level keys or shape of the unprojected response.

PlatformGiving.description: PlatformGiving represents aggregated giving data from a single crowdfunding platform.

activeCampaignsSampled.description:
Legacy live-sampling field. Zero is a not-collected compatibility sentinel
 unless provenance says otherwise.

dailyVolumeUsd.description:
Daily USD equivalent derived from an aggregate-eligible published claim.
 Zero means no eligible conversion, not measured zero giving.

dataFreshness.description:
Legacy source basis/cadence ("annual", "cumulative", or "unknown"), not
 response freshness or source age.

donationVelocity.description:
Legacy live-velocity field. Zero is a not-collected compatibility sentinel
 unless provenance says otherwise.

lastUpdated.description:
Verified source publication date only. Empty when no publication date was
 verified; request/cache time must never be substituted.

newCampaigns24h.description:
Legacy 24-hour field. Zero is a not-collected compatibility sentinel unless
 provenance says otherwise.

RateLimitError.description: Returned when a gateway or handler rate limit rejects the request.

UnauthorizedError.description: Returned when the API key is missing, malformed, or lacks current API access.

ValidationError.description: ValidationError is returned when request validation fails. It contains a list of field violations describing what went wrong.

ApiKeyHeader.description: Alias header for the WorldMonitor API key (X-WorldMonitor-Key).
ApiKeyHeader.name: X-Api-Key

get.description:
GetGivingSummary retrieves published-claim platform projections, a verified
 tracked-platform annualized flow estimate, and claim-level provenance.
 Compatibility index/trend fields are explicitly marked unavailable.
 Empty/absent summary with fetched_at=0 or data_available=false means the
 snapshot is unavailable/degraded, not that giving activity is zero.

parameters.description:
Number of platform rows to return (0 = all). Aggregates and provenance
 continue to describe the full snapshot.
parameters.name: platform_limit

parameters.description:
Number of category rows to return (0 = all). Aggregates and provenance
 continue to describe the full snapshot.
parameters.name: category_limit

parameters.description: Optional JMESPath expression applied server-side to project or reduce the JSON response before it is returned (mirrors the MCP jmespath argument). Invalid expressions, expressions larger than 1024 UTF-8 bytes, or projections that exceed the 256 KB output cap return HTTP 400 with a {_jmespath_error, original_keys} envelope. Grammar and worked examples: https://www.worldmonitor.app/docs/mcp-jmespath.
parameters.name: jmespath

provenance.notes: Exact claim: "More than $50 million is raised each week on GoFundMe." The source footnote says this is the average amount raised per week in 2023 and 2024.
provenance.sourceLocator: Homepage giving-volume claim and attached footnote 1
provenance.subject: GoFundMe weekly giving

provenance.derivation: Reported 2024 amount is used as an at-least annual estimate; no currency conversion.
provenance.notes: Exact claim: GlobalGiving raised more than USD 84 million in 2024.
provenance.sourceLocator: 2024 Year in Review, annual impact totals
provenance.subject: GlobalGiving 2024 giving

provenance.derivation: No annualization or USD conversion; cumulative GBP is provenance-only.
provenance.notes: Exact claim: JustGiving has helped people raise more than GBP 7 billion over 25 years.
provenance.subject: JustGiving cumulative giving

provenance.derivation: No derivation; retained in reported USD billions as institutional context only.
provenance.notes: Exact claim: official development assistance from DAC members totalled USD 223.7 billion in 2023. This is institutional context, not personal platform giving.
provenance.sourceLocator: 2023 ODA Figures and Trends launch, total ODA statement
provenance.subject: OECD official development assistance

provenance.derivation: No derivation; replaces the unsupported legacy bare 18 million grant count.
provenance.notes: Exact claim: Candid data represents about 3 million grants annually.
provenance.sourceLocator: Grants data fact sheet, annual grants-data coverage statement
provenance.subject: Candid grants represented annually

provenance.notes: Exact claim: Candid data represents about USD 180 billion in grantmaking annually.
provenance.sourceLocator: Grants data fact sheet, annual grants-data coverage statement
provenance.subject: Candid annual grantmaking represented

provenance.derivation: No derivation; unverified input is excluded from annual and daily flow.
provenance.notes: Exact legacy claim: total crypto giving was estimated at approximately USD 2 billion per year. No stable primary evidence was established, so the value is hidden and excluded.
provenance.referencePeriod: Legacy 2024 estimate; reference period not verified
provenance.subject: Legacy crypto-giving annual volume

provenance.derivation: No derivation; wallet count, receivers, and percentage are hidden.
provenance.notes: Exact legacy claim: 150 charity wallets were tracked, with named top receivers and an estimated 0.8 percent share. No collector or stable primary evidence was established.
provenance.referencePeriod: Legacy snapshot; reference period not verified
provenance.sourceLocator: Issue #5504, unsupported wallet and receiver metrics
provenance.subject: Legacy crypto wallet and receiver coverage

provenance.derivation: No derivation; value and year are hidden.
provenance.notes: Exact legacy claim: a global-average CAF World Giving Index value of 34 for 2024. No stable primary evidence for this exact displayed value was established.
provenance.subject: Legacy CAF World Giving Index context

provenance.derivation: No derivation; shares are hidden and live fields remain zero/false sentinels.
provenance.notes: Exact legacy claim: nine category shares totalled 1.0, led by Medical & Health at 0.33. Stable primary evidence for the displayed distribution was not established.
provenance.referencePeriod: Legacy snapshot; reference period not verified
provenance.sourceLocator: Issue #5504, unsupported category values and trending semantics
provenance.subject: Legacy giving category shares

provenance.derivation: No derivation; zero and false are compatibility sentinels, not measured activity.
provenance.notes: Exact collection status: no live campaign-sampling or on-chain transaction collector populates these fields.
provenance.subject: Live platform and category activity collection

provenance.derivation: No derivation; retain activityIndex=0 and trend="stable" only for wire compatibility.
provenance.notes: Exact compatibility status: no measured activity index or historical directional trend is available.
provenance.subject: Activity index and directional trend

403.description: API access requires an active subscription (the API key's subscription is inactive or expired).

Retry-After.description: Seconds to wait before retrying the request.

X-RateLimit-Limit.description: Maximum requests allowed in the active rate-limit window.

X-RateLimit-Remaining.description: Requests remaining in the active rate-limit window.

X-RateLimit-Reset.description: Unix epoch milliseconds when the active rate-limit window resets.
